chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 878 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.6413/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.6414/2025 (561-A, Cr.P.C.) 13.11.2025 Mr. Shahid Ali Memon, Advocate, holding brief for Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. By way of application typo in the order dated 22.05.2025, whereby the surety was already ordered to be returned, is required as the applicant has not been able to acquire the surety on account of typo, whereby the date of 26.11.2024 has come up in the said order instead of 05.12.2023, when the interim order was provided to the accused. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, learned Additional Prosecutor General, present in Court in other matters, was pleased to waive the notice and extended his no objection. Even otherwise, the same pertains to record, which is ever present and has been observed to be so. Accordingly, application stands allowed. Let the date of 26.11.2024 be read as 05.12.2023 in the order dated 22.05.2025 accordingly. Application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
